title: Physics Explosion with Custom Ackermann AMR on Movement
description: Custom Ackermann car (OnShape parametric design) explodes/flies apart when physics simulation starts in Isaac Sim 5.1.0. Stock F1Tenth.usd works; issue with imported custom USD + ROS bridge.

title: omni.datastore Exclusive Lock Error on Headless Standalone
description: omni.datastore fails to acquire exclusive lock (256>=256) on DerivedDataCache when running python.sh standalone headless. Blocks CI/CD and cloud pipelines.

title: Mecanum Wheel Physics Pivot Mismatch and Jitter in Imported USD
description: Mecanum wheel physics show pivot mismatch and jitter after USD import. Joint/physics instability pattern similar to Ackermann issue.

title: LidarRTX StableIDMap Missing Object IDs
description: When recording scenes with LidarRTX, some assets return object IDs not in the StableIDMap. Breaks perception pipelines relying on consistent ID mapping.

title: ROS 2 Install Fails on IGX Orin dGPU — Kernel/Driver Conflict
description: Installing ROS 2 Humble on IGX Orin after Isaac Sim 5.1 fails. Kernel upgrade fixes ROS 2 but breaks GPU driver. Catch-22 for Nova Carter workflow.

title: Nucleus Connection Fails Cross-Machine
description: Add Nucleus Connection fails when connecting Isaac Sim from a remote machine on the same network, despite Nucleus web UI being accessible at :8080.

title: Jetson AGX Thor WebRTC Livestream Not Working
description: Headless Isaac Sim 5.1.0 on Jetson AGX Thor cannot serve WebRTC livestream to remote browser. Core workflow for headless-on-edge use cases.

title: Synthetic Data Generation Workflow Gaps for Defect Detection
description: User generating synth data for aerospace blade defect detection unclear how to apply defect overlays procedurally in Replicator. Documentation gap.

title: Live Session Performance Degrades with ~1000 Transform Updates/Frame
description: Performance degrades severely when pushing ~1000 transform updates per frame through Omniverse Live Sessions. Relevant for digital twin and multi-robot sim.

title: DLSS Frame Generation Missing from Render Settings
description: DLSS Frame Generation checkbox absent from Isaac Sim render settings. Users want it for interactive viewport performance.

title: WebViewWidget Revival Request
description: Request to revive omni.ui WebViewWidget for embedding web content in Isaac Sim UI panels.

title: Fluid Simulation in Isaac Sim — Realistic Pipe Flow
description: User wants realistic fluid dynamics for water flowing through pipes. Current PhysX particle-based fluid is limited. Newton engine may address.
